NOTICE OF MOTION TO COMPEL PLTF'S DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF AND HER COUNSEL FILED BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC., (ERRONEOUSLY SUED HEREIN AS "SAFEWAY, INC. A CORPORATION, DBA PAK'N SAVE FOODS") HEARING SET FOR NOV-09-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC., (ERRONEOUSLY SUED HEREIN AS "SAFEWAY, INC. A CORPORATION, DBA PAK'N SAVE FOODS")
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC., (ERRONEOUSLY SUED HEREIN AS "SAFEWAY, INC. A CORPORATION, DBA PAK'N SAVE FOODS")
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR NOV-19-2012. OCT-17-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF ANNE F. MARCHANT FILED BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC., (ERRONEOUSLY SUED HEREIN AS "SAFEWAY, INC. A CORPORATION, DBA PAK'N SAVE FOODS")
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-09-2012 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302
ORDER GRANTING SAFEWAY'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND AWARDING SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND HER COUNSEL
ORDER AND STIPULATION FOR MOTION TO BE HEARD BY A MEMBER OF THE CALIFORNIA BAR SERVING AS A TEMPORARY JUDGE

DISCOVERY 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC.'S NOTICE OF MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND HER COUNSEL IS GRANTED. BY FAILING TO RESPOND TO THE DISCOVERY PROPOUNDED WITHIN THE TIME LIMITS PROVIDED IN THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE, PLAINTIFF HAS WAIVED ALL OBJECTIONS. WITHIN 30 DAYS, PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE VERIFIED, CODE-COMPLIANT RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, TO SAFEWAY'S REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE; SAFEWAY'S SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE; AND SAFEWAY'S FORM INTERROGATORIES - GENERAL, SET ONE. SAFEWAY'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN PART, IN THE AMOUNT OF $740 PLUS $80 = $820. WITHIN 30 DAYS, PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY SAFEWAY $820.00. ORDER SIGNED. ERNST HALPERIN, JUDGE PRO-TEM, JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, CLERK, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED NOV-09-12 FILED BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC., (ERRONEOUSLY SUED HEREIN AS "SAFEWAY, INC. A CORPORATION, DBA PAK'N SAVE FOODS")
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE NOV-29-2012.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR ALLAN MARTIN SCHUMAN.
ARBITRATOR PAUL RAYMOND PERDUE APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION NOV-30-2012 THROUGH FEB-28-2013.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF DISMISSAL AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC., (ERRONEOUSLY SUED HEREIN AS "SAFEWAY, INC. A CORPORATION, DBA PAK'N SAVE FOODS")
ASSIGNMENT TO ARBITRATION OF NOV-09-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE.

calendar.matters:
ARBITRATOR JURISDICTION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar May-30-2013 Off Calendar

ORDER TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Nov-30-2012 Set To Order To Arbtitration Calendar

ASSIGN TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Nov-19-2012 Select Panel Of Arbitrators

Notice Of Motion To Compel Pltf'S Discovery Responses And For Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf And Her Counsel
Off Calendar Nov-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Anne F. Marchant, Kelly Hockel Klein, 415.951.0535, appearing for Defendant;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Ruling: THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC.'S Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Discovery Responses And For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Her Counsel is GRANTED. By failing to respond to the discovery propounded within the time limits provided in the Code of Civil Procedure, Plaintiff has waived all objections. Within 30 days, Plaintiff shall serve verified, code-compliant responses without objections, to Safeway's Requests for Production of Documents, Set One; Safeway's Special Interrogatories, Set One; and Safeway's Form Interrogatories - General, Set One. Safeway's request for sanctions is GRANTED IN PART, in the amount of $740 plus $80 = $820. Within 30 days, Plaintiff shall pay Safeway $820.00. Order signed. Ernst Halperin, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT
